title: BEM-843 commit marker
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:04 (UTC+3)'
commit=Path('scripts/commit_queue_processor_marker_results.sh')
commit.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\ngit config user.name "github-actions[bot]"\ngit config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"\ngit add -A governance/state/queue_processor_step_seen.json governance/workflow_dispatch_results/queue_processor_step_seen.status.json governance/workflow_dispatch_results || true\ngit diff --cached --quiet && echo "No queue marker/result changes" || git commit -m "BEM-843 queue processor marker/results"\ngit pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true\ngit push || true\n''')
runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text=runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
insert='''\n      - name: Commit queue processor marker results\n        if: always()\n        run: bash scripts/commit_queue_processor_marker_results.sh\n'''
changed=False
if runner.exists() and 'Commit queue processor marker results' not in text:
    anchor='      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue'
    if anchor in text:
        text=text.replace(anchor,insert+anchor,1)
    else:
        anchor2='      - name: Complete job'
        if anchor2 in text:
            text=text.replace(anchor2,insert+anchor2,1)
        else:
            text=text+insert
    runner.write_text(text)
    changed=True
state={'bem':'BEM-843','status':'queue_marker_commit_step_installed','runner_changed':changed,'commit_script':str(commit),'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem843_commit_queue_marker_results.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem843_commit_queue_marker_results.md').write_text('# BEM-843 | Commit Queue Marker Results | PASS'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md').write_text('Next: run fresh Codex tick and verify queue marker/result persisted. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-843'+sep+sep+'Queue marker commit step installed. Next: tick and verify marker/result.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(commit),str(runner),'governance/state/bem843_commit_queue_marker_results.json','governance/reports/bem843_commit_queue_marker_results.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Installed a dedicated commit step for queue processor marker and workflow dispatch result files in codex-runner')
"""
